SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class WellBranch

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.WellBranch
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, NetworkBranch
public class WellBranch extends Object implements NetworkBranch
A well branch in an integrated production network.

A well branch connects a fixed-pressure reservoir node to a downstream node (typically a wellhead or a manifold). Its deliverability is represented by a WellDeliverabilityCurve (a reduced IPR + VLP surrogate). The branch is reservoir-pressure aware: the curve is built at a reference reservoir pressure and the delivered rate scales with the actual reservoir node pressure, so the same branch can be reused as the reservoir depletes during a production-profile run.

An optional choke factor (0..1) and a gas-lift uplift factor (≥ 1) multiply the deliverability, allowing chokes and gas lift to participate directly in the network equilibrium.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:
  • NetworkNewtonSolver
  • WellDeliverabilityCurve

  • Constructor Details

    • WellBranch

      public WellBranch(String name, String reservoirNode, String downstreamNode, WellDeliverabilityCurve curve, double referenceReservoirPressureBara)
      Creates a well branch.
      Parameters:
      name - unique branch name
      reservoirNode - upstream reservoir node name
      downstreamNode - downstream node name (wellhead/manifold)
      curve - well deliverability curve
      referenceReservoirPressureBara - reservoir pressure at which the curve was built, in bara

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the branch name.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface NetworkBranch
      Returns:
      branch name

    • getFromNode

      public String getFromNode()
      Returns the upstream node name.
      Specified by:
      getFromNode in interface NetworkBranch
      Returns:
      upstream node name

    • getToNode

      public String getToNode()
      Returns the downstream node name.
      Specified by:
      getToNode in interface NetworkBranch
      Returns:
      downstream node name

    • flow

      public double flow(double reservoirPressureBara, double downstreamPressureBara)
      Computes the volumetric flow through the branch.
      Specified by:
      flow in interface NetworkBranch
      Parameters:
      reservoirPressureBara - upstream node pressure in bara
      downstreamPressureBara - downstream node pressure in bara
      Returns:
      volumetric surface flow in Sm3/day, positive from upstream to downstream

    • setChokeFactor

      public void setChokeFactor(double factor)
      Sets the choke factor (fraction of full deliverability passed by the choke).
      Parameters:
      factor - choke factor in [0, 1]

    • getChokeFactor

      public double getChokeFactor()
      Returns the choke factor.
      Returns:
      choke factor in [0, 1]

    • setLiftFactor

      public void setLiftFactor(double factor)
      Sets the gas-lift deliverability uplift factor (1.0 = no lift).
      Parameters:
      factor - uplift factor, ≥ 1.0

    • getLiftFactor

      public double getLiftFactor()
      Returns the gas-lift uplift factor.
      Returns:
      uplift factor, ≥ 1.0

    • setReferenceReservoirPressure

      public void setReferenceReservoirPressure(double referenceReservoirPressureBara)
      Updates the reservoir pressure used to scale the deliverability curve.
      Parameters:
      referenceReservoirPressureBara - reference reservoir pressure in bara

      Returns the most recently evaluated rate (diagnostic).
      Returns:
